title: 45-Year Two-Way Radio Sales & Service Business w/ Recurring Revenue
reasonForSelling: Owner retiring after 45+ years in business
supportTraining: Seller willing to provide transition assistance to ensure a smooth handoff and continued success of operations.
description:
DCS Radio Communication, Inc. is a well-established, turnkey two-way radio sales and service business serving Fort Smith, Arkansas and the surrounding region since 1980. The company specializes in the sale of two-way radios, antennas, base stations, repeaters, and accessories, along with professional installation and upfitting for emergency vehicles, commercial fleets, and industrial clients.

Additional revenue streams include service and maintenance contracts, tower rentals, community repeaters, and 450 MHz trunking, generating consistent recurring income. The business also provides GPS services and communication system solutions.

The company has built a strong reputation with long-term customers across public safety, municipalities, construction, and commercial sectors. With experienced staff, established vendor relationships, and dependable recurring revenue, this business offers stability and recession resistance.

Financially, the business generates over $1M in annual revenue with normalized seller discretionary earnings of approximately $200K. Recurring service contracts and tower income provide additional reliability and cash flow.

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a legacy communications business with strong fundamentals and clear growth opportunities in digital radio expansion and service agreements. Ideal for an industry professional, technician, or investor seeking a stable, cash-flowing operation.

Ad#:2488772
